action_logs.rule_description: Sets the minimum number of supplier quotes to 1 for budgets between 0 and 24,999.99 EUR.
action_tuple: WHEN budget >= 0 AND budget <= 24999.99 AND currency = "EUR"

flags.description: The preferred-supplier 10% bonus elevated 'WPP Performance Media' from rank 0.9764 to 1.0000, above the next-ranked supplier at 0.9948. Without the bonus this supplier would not have ranked #1.
